title: DNS Gateway Configuration
description: Configuration for the dns_gateway UDP listener filter. Defines domain patterns, virtual IP CIDR ranges, and metadata for DNS interception and routing.

domains.description: Domain matchers, each with its own CIDR range for virtual IP allocation.

domain.description: Exact domain ("example.com") or single-level wildcard pattern ("*.example.com").

base_ip.description: Base IPv4 address for virtual IP allocation (e.g. "10.239.0.0").

prefix_len.description: CIDR prefix length (1-32). A /24 gives 256 virtual IPs.

metadata.description: String key-value pairs exposed in Envoy filter state as envoy.dns_gateway.metadata.<key>.
